description_long: This is a sleek, modern laptop with a dark metallic finish and a minimalist design. The device features a large, black screen bordered by thin bezels, and a full-sized keyboard with a touch bar above the function keys. The trackpad is generously sized and centrally located below the keyboard, while the palm rest area is smooth and unadorned. The back of the lid displays a prominent, glossy Apple logo set against the matte surface. The laptop's profile is slim, with a slight taper towards the front edge, and the hinge mechanism is nearly invisible from most angles. The overall construction suggests a premium build, likely using aluminum for durability and a refined aesthetic.
description: A slim, dark metallic laptop with a large black screen, full keyboard, touch bar, and a prominent Apple logo on the lid. The design is minimalist and premium, with a smooth, matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open black screen, full keyboard with touch bar, and large trackpad.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thin profile and the open screen, with the keyboard and touch bar visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the matte lid with a glossy Apple logo centered.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the slim profile and the open screen, similar to the left side.
attribute_brand_logo: A glossy black Apple logo is centered on the back of the lid, shaped as a stylized apple with a bite taken out of the right side.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned off, with no visible content displayed.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard layout is QWERTY with a function row replaced by a touch bar, and no numeric keypad. The keys are black with white lettering.
